name: Aurora
summary: A soft luminous digital style using layered color fields, gentle glow, and airy depth.

palette: cool gradients, spectral accents, soft dark or light neutrals
shapes: large flowing fields and rounded interface edges
effects: subtle glow, blurred color transitions, atmospheric depth
layout: open compositions with strong focal zones
imagery: abstract light fields and product silhouettes

notes: Use behind content, not over text.
Use accessible contrast on glowing surfaces.

recommendations: Use a progressive, calm, luminous personality.
avoid: Avoid implying entertainment if the product is operational.

recommendations: Define restrained gradient accents and neutral readable surfaces.
avoid: Avoid placing body text directly on saturated gradients.

recommendations: Use simple line icons with optional soft accent fills.
Use clear solid buttons with optional luminous accent border.
Use layered panels with subtle color depth.
avoid: Avoid blur that hides content edges.

recommendations: Use clean nav over stable surface.
avoid: Avoid animated backgrounds behind nav labels.

recommendations: Use subdued gradient accents and structured links.
avoid: Avoid atmospheric effects that obscure legal links.

recommendations: Add subtle light edge and calm depth.
Use stable readable panel with ambient backdrop.
Use light edge or mild lift.
avoid: Avoid large color blooms on hover.

recommendations: Use short fades with slight depth shift.
Use soft highlight feedback with text labels.

accessibilityRisks.risk: Atmospheric gradients can reduce text contrast.
accessibilityRisks.mitigation: Place text on stable opaque or high-contrast surfaces.

css: Use layered gradients behind readable panels.
avoid: Do not use decorative glow as the only state indicator.
